evidence.target_source: Verdict callout 'You're almost there -- There are still more parts of this question to answer. Give it another try!' plus 'Try again' AXButton and no 'Check' button (3 of 4).
evidence.why_safe: This is a POST-WRONG-ANSWER state (mastery already affected). Per the recipe the only sanctioned output is an empty behavior tree {} which the engine routes to the escalation ladder; no advancing BT is built, nothing is re-answered, resubmitted, or clicked ('Try again' is forbidden). Recovery is escalation-gated, not a recipe action.
